description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and side, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. A spacious front porch with potted plants and outdoor seating creates a welcoming entryway. The interior layout is open, featuring a living room, kitchen, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all visible through the large windows and open doorways. The house is constructed mainly from concrete or plaster, glass, and wood, with some metal elements for window frames and doors. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity, functionality, and indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a welcoming front porch. The design is minimalist, featuring white walls and open, light-filled interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large glass windows, main entry porch with seating, and visible interior living and kitchen areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, additional windows, and partial view of the porch and interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid wall with a single door and window, less fenestration compared to the front.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the living room with a TV, the porch, and a glimpse into the house's open-plan layout.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a wide glass door, front porch with seating and potted plants, and no overhang or columns.
